features: TOILET BLOCK THAT CLEANS - Have the loo continuously cleaned with every flush. Fresh Blue Toilet Blocks are specially formulated to kill germs and keep the bowl clean and stain-free.
CISTERN BLOCKS THAT FRESHEN - Simply place one of these toilet cistern blocks in the tank and enjoy its fresh fragrance. Masks unpleasant smells while freshening the entire room.
SPARKLING BLUE COLOUR - Give your toilet a refreshing blue colour. You’ll know it’s time to change the toilet block when the colour fades.
ECONOMICAL TOILET BLOCKS FOR CISTERNS - Always have plenty of cistern blocks on hand with this convenient and economical 6-pack.
100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEE - If you’re not entirely pleased with your purchase, we’ll gladly provide a replacement or refund.
description: Product Description "DECORATE THE AIR As part of the Airpure family of products, this 6-pack of MIGHTY BURST Fresh Blue Toilet Blocks offers a convenient way to keep your loo clean and fresh. Decorate the air in your bathroom by using this specially formulated toilet cistern block as part of your cleaning routine to keep your bathroom smelling nice. Enjoy its sparkling blue colour. " Ingredients Toilet Block
